home.break-title: Taking a break ☕ — don't forget to come back!

onBoarding.title: Track your work time easily
onBoarding.description: Clock in, manage time entries, and request leave — all in one place.

login.title: Sign in to your account
login.description: Manage your work schedule, request time off, and view your daily logs with ease. Stay organized and in control of your work life.

timeFormat.24hourDesc: The time will be displayed from 0 to 23.
timeFormat.12hourDesc: The time will be displayed from 1 to 12.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Please enter your e-mail address to receive a verification code

quickActions.title: Quick Actions
quickActions.requestCorrectionDesc: Fix or edit your time entry

requestVacation.title: Request Vacation
requestVacation.noRequestDesc: You haven’t made any vacation requests yet.
requestVacation.selectDateLeave: Select the date of your leave
requestVacation.successSubmit: Your request has been submitted and is waiting for approval.

requestCorrection.title: Request Correction
requestCorrection.noRequestDesc: If you missed a clock-in or need to fix a time entry, you can request it here.
requestCorrection.chooseDateCorrect: Choose the date you want to correct
requestCorrection.commentPlaceholder: Explain why this change is needed
requestCorrection.successSubmit: Your request has been submitted and is waiting for approval.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: It seems that the page you are looking for does not exist.

aboutApp.title: About App
aboutApp.p1: At Clockwise, your privacy is paramount. Delve into the specifics of the data we gather and discover how we empower you to maintain control over your personal information, ensuring a secure and personalized experience.
aboutApp.p2: Safeguarding your information is our top priority. Our comprehensive privacy policy provides an in-depth explanation of the measures we take to ensure your data is handled securely, with transparency and integrity.
aboutApp.p3: We believe in transparency and empowering you with control. Explore your privacy rights in detail and learn how to effortlessly manage your information, putting you in charge of your data and preferences.
aboutApp.p4: We are dedicated to upholding the highest standards of data protection. Explore our detailed practices for data collection and usage, gaining insights into how we prioritize your privacy and security at every step.
aboutApp.p5: We are dedicated to upholding the highest standards of data protection. Explore our detailed practices for data collection and usage, gaining insights into how we prioritize your privacy and security at every step.

modals.deleteAccountDesc: This action cannot be undone. Your profile and all related data will be permanently removed.
modals.signOutDesc: Are you sure you want to sign out? You will need to log in again to continue.
